query:
SELECT b.id, b.predictedScoreA, b.predictedScoreB, b.pointsEarned, b.resultType,
  g.scoreA as real_A, g.scoreB as real_B, g.status as game_status,
  g.matchDate, p.name as pool_name
FROM bets b
JOIN games g ON g.id = b.gameId
JOIN pools p ON p.id = b.poolId
WHERE b.userId = 1
ORDER BY b.updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
